features: Easy Installation: The trash can has a high-strength hook, which can be hung on the edge of the door and the back seat, or placed in the seat back pocket; Also can be used for office trash can, living room, kitchen, bedroom, dinning room trash bin
Perfect Design: With the easy bounce cover design,Ensure the trash can sealed well to avoid unpleasant odors from escaping into the car
With Garbage Bags: Keep the trash can clean and easy to collect garbage, you can easily throw garbage bags into the garbage station when you get off the bus

Premium Quality Material: Environmental friendly paint, which has no smell and no fade. Mini Trash Can with premium quality materials to provide maximum strength, durability, and longevity.Safty and hygiene
Exquisite Appearance: The best choice for car trash can.It's a tiny, convenient and functional car garbage can with fashionable, durable and cute appearance
description: Product Description Mini trash can（Widely used） Our trash cans are made of high-quality materials and have a small-volume design. They can be easily installed on vehicles, but the capacity is sufficient for everyday use. The trash can is equipped with hooks that can be hung next to the car door, on the back seat of the car, and in the back pocket of the car seat. It can also be used in the desk, kitchen, bedroom and living room. EINESIN mini trash can using waterproof plastic materials to provide maximum durability and longevity, good waterproof performance. Unlike most sellers, our trash can is equipped with 40 heavy-duty trash bags, making it easier for you to collect trash while keeping the trash can tidy. Waterproof & Leakproof Unlike most sellers, our trash can is equipped with 40 heavy-duty trash bags, making it easier for you to collect trash while keeping the trash can tidy. The garbage bag is made of high elastic material, so you don't have to worry about tearing when you dispose of the garbage. The trash can itself is leakproof like a trash bag. Size Our trash cans are made of high-quality materials and have a small-volume design. They can be easily installed on vehicles, but the capacity is sufficient for everyday use. The lid of the bin can also be removed for easy cleaning of the bin and replacing the bin bag. The hanging design is convenient to remove and install, you can hang it on the door, car seat, or put it on the floor and countertop.
